1.-THE ore Is mostly iron pyritcs and
gray copper and Is extremely rich in
gold. While on the property tool,
several hand samples giving values
In gold and silver ranging from Sal. 10
to $414.A per ton"


Secretary John Mackenzie Of the
Handy company supplemented the In
terview with the report Of the Assays

Samples taken from west end OF

The Handy Gold Mines Develop
ment company was organized in this
city last spring by Colonel w. N.
Brayton of Kaslo, who is president
and manager Minnesota and local
capital is behind the enterprise.
